commit.message:
feat: rebrand bitchat-android → Serendip (com.serendip.chat)

Complete rebranding and feature expansion from the original bitchat-android
open-source project. Preserves full commit history and GPLv3 license.

Key additions & changes:
- Package renamed com.bitchat.android → com.serendip.chat
- Nearby Map: BLE peer locations with coverage circles, location picking
- Geohash Activity Map: live Nostr presence, precision-6 grid overlay
- Nostr presence: broadcasts geohash only (~1km), never raw GPS
- LocationTLV: location hops through mesh via existing relay system
- Header redesign: gradient title, enlarged icons, colour-coded controls
- Sheet title gradients (red→orange→yellow→light green) throughout
- About sheet: matching header, callebtc/@jack attribution, license footer
- ProGuard rules updated (com.serendip.chat, removed dead Tor rules)
- Release signing config via environment variables
- Tor/Arti code and binaries removed
- zapstore.yaml added for Nostr-based app publishing
- NOTICE.md added with required GPLv3 attribution

Based on: https://github.com/permissionlesstech/bitchat-android

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix mobile responsiveness across 23 components

Replace hardcoded widths with fluid/responsive alternatives to prevent
horizontal overflow on screens < 375px, improve touch targets to meet
44px WCAG minimum, and add responsive grid breakpoints for exercise
layouts.

Critical fixes:
- Statistics chart: remove hardcoded 1000px width, auto-size to container
- Modal body: add 1024px intermediate breakpoint (was jumping 1200px→640px)
- Robot 404 SVG: replace fixed 320x300 with max-width:100%/height:auto
- Error page pre: add overflow-x-auto and whitespace-pre-wrap
- Image display block: min-width min(350px, 100%)
- Exercise type card: max-width:410px + width:100% instead of fixed 410px

Layout fixes:
- Responsive avatars/logos on description, specialists, developers, profile
- Overflow-hidden on negative-margin containers
- Confirm dialog: max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] on mobile
- Grids collapse to fewer columns on small screens (audiometry, auditory
  sequence, phoneme pairs)
- Footer sponsors: add flex-wrap
- Task player: cap 4-5 column exercises to 2 columns on mobile
- Contributors: add gap-4 for consistent spacing

Touch & polish:
- Text-image button landscape min-height 40px→44px
- Header language buttons: min-h/w 44px touch targets
- Header dropdown: remove white-space:nowrap
- Landing hero: text-2xl sm:text-4xl, max-h-[70vh] sm:max-h-[860px]
- Exercise button: max-width min(168px, 100%)
- Fix pre-existing invalid Tailwind class min-width-10→min-w-10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Cria 10 jogos educacionais para cobrir lacunas do Fundamental II

Análise de cobertura identificou gap crítico no 6-9 ano: quase
todas as matérias tinham zero jogos nessa faixa. Criados:

- Equações Aventura (Matemática 6-9): equações progressivas
- Geometria Aventura (Matemática 6-9): formas, Pitágoras, trigonometria
- História: Brasil e Mundo (História 3-9): 7 eras históricas
- Química dos Elementos (Ciências 8-9): tabela periódica e moléculas
- Geopolítica Mundial (Geografia 8-9): quiz por continente
- Sequências Mágicas (Lógica 1-2): padrões para crianças
- Lógica de Programação (Lógica 8-9): programação visual com robô
- Arte Digital Studio (Artes 6-9): desenho e teoria das cores
- Educação Financeira (Transversal 6-9): simulador de finanças
- English Kids (Inglês 1-2): primeiras palavras em inglês

Total: 69 → 79 jogos educacionais, 156 páginas no build.

commit.message:
feat: Celery queue with duplicate prevention, webhook delivery, and tier routing

Wire end-to-end task execution: API enqueues to Redis via Celery send_task,
workers claim tasks with atomic UPDATE WHERE status='queued' guard and Redis
distributed locks. Webhook delivery is a separate Celery task with HMAC-SHA256
signing and exponential backoff (30s-480s, 5 retries).

- workers/db.py: sync SQLAlchemy engine for Celery workers (psycopg2)
- workers/tasks.py: execute_task with duplicate prevention + Redis lock,
  deliver_webhook with HMAC signing, result/step/cost persistence
- workers/main.py: visibility_timeout=900, prefork pool, 2 concurrency
- api/routes/tasks.py: uncommented Celery enqueue with tier routing
- api/models/account.py: added webhook_secret column

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add portfolio subsite and fix broken portfolio/presentation links

Portfolio files were in a sibling directory, causing 404s on Netlify.
Copied into repo and updated all relative paths to work from deployment root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix AI badge display: change ai_categorization column from text to jsonb

The ai_categorization column was stored as text, but the frontend expects
a parsed JSON object for badge rendering. PostgREST returns text columns
as strings, so properties like .category, .is_urgent were always undefined.
Changed to jsonb so PostgREST returns parsed objects. Updated TS types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

simplify branch caching with functools.lru_cache

Replace custom sentinel class and manual cache dict with
@functools.lru_cache, removing unnecessary complexity.

commit.message:
fix(mobile): verify BUG-001 mic release via removePublishedTrack — field tested

Three fix iterations for Android mic release on mute:
1. setAndroidAudioConfiguration(media) — insufficient (AudioRecord still held)
2. ADM stopLocalRecording() — insufficient (PeerConnection overrides)
3. removePublishedTrack() — works (removes RtpSender, triggers SDP renegotiation)

Remove unused dart:io and flutter_webrtc imports. Close task 005.

Fix 18 bugs and UX improvements across the app

- Add Extra class status to all attendance mark buttons
- Show all mark options (not just toggle) on already-marked attendance
- Rename 'Delete old tasks' to 'Archive old tasks' for accuracy

- Fix ExamsPage accordion animation (CSS grid trick replaces maxHeight:99999px)
- Calendar now shows exam dates + timetable classes alongside tasks
- Calendar Add Task button pre-fills the selected date in TasksPage
- Remove inconsistent dark: Tailwind classes from CalendarPage
- Add offline indicator banner (WifiOff icon, amber) in App.jsx
- Improve auth loading state with pulse skeleton instead of plain text

commit.message:
fix: drop REFERENCES clause from ALTER TABLE migration

SQLite's ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN doesn't reliably support REFERENCES.
The FK is defined in the CREATE TABLE DDL for new deployments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add End-Persistent signal and persistent session cleanup to HttpServer

Add support for explicit persistent session termination via the
"Qorus-Connection: End-Persistent" header in both HTTP/1.x and HTTP/2
persistent handler loops. On HTTP/2, disconnect() doesn't close the TCP
connection (multiplexed), so the server's persistent handler loop never
gets a close signal - the End-Persistent mechanism allows clients to
explicitly terminate persistent sessions.

Changes:
- handleMultiplexedPersistentSync: accept deregister_fn and sock_key
  params; handle End-Persistent signal; deregister persistent queue
  before returning to prevent race conditions; keep persistent handlers
  alive on idle timeout (only exit for non-persistent handlers)
- handlePersistentSync (HTTP/1.x): handle End-Persistent signal
- handleRequest catch block: clean up leaked persistent state when
  handler became persistent during a failed request but phi.handler
  was never set
- Add drainOrphanedPersistentRequests() to process requests pushed to
  the persistent queue during the race window between the last pq.get()
  and deregistration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
